allow: Bash(git commit -m 'chore: allow common git ops in project settings *)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'fix\(task01\): stream-json + transport-crash classification in run_eval' --body ' *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: allow git push and gh pr create *)

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Run /sync-state to update docs/agent-state.md with session changes."}'
